name: Cloudflare API token (cfk_)
description: A Cloudflare API token using the modern cfk_ prefix was found. These tokens grant scoped access to Cloudflare DNS, WAF, Workers and account resources.
message: Cloudflare API token (cfk_) found; revoke it in the Cloudflare dashboard under My Profile > API Tokens

name: Cloudflare user/account token (cfut_/cfat_)
description: A Cloudflare user (cfut_) or account (cfat_) API token was found. These grant programmatic access to Cloudflare resources.
message: Cloudflare user/account token found; revoke it in the Cloudflare dashboard

name: Heroku API key (v2 HRKU-)
description: A Heroku v2 platform API key using the HRKU- prefix was found. It grants full access to the Heroku account's apps, config vars and add-ons.
message: Heroku API key found; revoke it with 'heroku authorizations:revoke' and rotate

name: Salesforce access token
description: A Salesforce OAuth access token was found. It grants API access to the Salesforce org until it expires or is revoked.
message: Salesforce access token found; revoke the connected app session and rotate

name: Cohere API key
description: A Cohere API key was found in source. It grants access to Cohere LLM inference and embeddings billed to the account.
message: Cohere API key found; revoke it in the Cohere dashboard and rotate

name: Mistral AI API key
description: A Mistral AI API key was found in source. It grants access to Mistral model inference billed to the account.
message: Mistral AI API key found; revoke it in the Mistral console and rotate

name: Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_)
description: A Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_) was found. It lets an attacker forge valid webhook signatures to your endpoint.
message: Stripe webhook signing secret found; roll it in the Stripe dashboard webhook settings

name: PayPal / Braintree access token
description: A PayPal or Braintree access token was found, granting access to payment processing for the merchant account.
message: PayPal/Braintree production access token found; revoke and rotate in the gateway settings

name: Figma personal access token (figd_)
description: A Figma personal access token (figd_) was found, granting API access to the user's Figma files and projects.
message: Figma personal access token found; revoke it in Figma account settings

name: Vercel API token (vc*_)
description: A Vercel API token using a vcp_/vci_/vca_/vcr_/vck_ prefix was found, granting access to deployments, projects and environment variables.
message: Vercel API token found; revoke it at vercel.com/account/tokens

name: Netlify API token (nf*_)
description: A Netlify API token using an nfp_/nfc_/nfo_/nfu_/nfb_ prefix was found, granting access to site deployments and account settings.
message: Netlify API token found; revoke it in Netlify user settings > applications

name: HubSpot private app token (pat-)
description: A HubSpot private app access token (pat-na1-/pat-eu1-) was found, granting API access to the HubSpot portal's CRM data.
message: HubSpot private app token found; rotate it in HubSpot private app settings

name: Canva client secret (cnvca)
description: A Canva Connect API client secret (cnvca prefix) was found, allowing OAuth client impersonation.
message: Canva client secret found; rotate it in the Canva developer portal

name: PagerDuty API token
description: A PagerDuty REST API token was found, granting access to incidents, schedules and escalation policies.
message: PagerDuty API token found; revoke it in PagerDuty API access settings

name: Sentry DSN with secret
description: A legacy Sentry DSN containing both the public and secret key was found, allowing event submission and project access.
message: Sentry DSN with secret key found; rotate the project keys in Sentry settings

name: Postmark server API token
description: A Postmark server token was found, allowing transactional email to be sent from the account.
message: Postmark server token found; rotate it in the Postmark server API tokens page

name: Crates.io (Rust) API token
description: A crates.io registry API token (cio prefix) was found, allowing publishing crates as the token owner.
message: crates.io API token found; revoke it at crates.io/settings/tokens

name: Zapier webhook URL
description: A Zapier catch-hook webhook URL was found, allowing arbitrary data to be injected into the user's Zaps.
message: Zapier webhook URL found; regenerate the trigger in Zapier to invalidate it

name: Linear API key (lin_api_)
description: A Linear API key (lin_api_ prefix) was found, granting access to the workspace's issues and projects.
message: Linear API key found; revoke it in Linear workspace API settings

name: Oracle Cloud (OCI) API private key
description: An Oracle Cloud Infrastructure API signing private key (PEM RSA private key paired with an OCI user) was found. It authenticates as the OCI user and grants API access to all permitted tenancy resources.
token_pattern: (-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----[\s\S]{64,}?-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----)
message: Oracle Cloud API signing key found; delete the API key under the OCI user's API Keys and upload a freshly generated key pair

name: Oracle Cloud (OCI) auth token
description: An Oracle Cloud Infrastructure user auth token assigned to a context keyword was found. OCI auth tokens are used for Swift/object-storage and other token-based API authentication.
message: Oracle Cloud auth token found; delete it under the OCI user's Auth Tokens and generate a replacement

name: IBM Cloud IAM API key
description: An IBM Cloud IAM API key assigned to a context keyword was found. IBM Cloud IAM keys grant programmatic access to the account's services according to the key owner's IAM policies.
message: IBM Cloud IAM API key found; delete it in the IBM Cloud console under Manage > Access (IAM) > API keys and create a new one

name: Tencent Cloud secret ID (AKID)
description: A Tencent Cloud API secret ID using the AKID prefix was found. The secret ID identifies the API caller and is paired with a secret key to sign Tencent Cloud API requests.
message: Tencent Cloud secret ID found; disable the API key pair in the Tencent Cloud CAM console and create a new key

name: Tencent Cloud secret key
description: A Tencent Cloud API secret key assigned to a context keyword was found. The secret key signs Tencent Cloud API requests and, with the matching secret ID, grants full API access.
message: Tencent Cloud secret key found; disable the API key pair in the Tencent Cloud CAM console and rotate

name: Yandex Cloud IAM token
description: A Yandex Cloud IAM bearer token (t1. prefix) was found. IAM tokens are short-lived credentials that authorize Yandex Cloud API calls for the associated account or service account.
message: Yandex Cloud IAM token found; it is short-lived but revoke the issuing key/credential in the Yandex Cloud console and reissue

name: Yandex Cloud OAuth token
description: A Yandex Cloud OAuth token (y0_ / y1_ / y2_ / y3_ prefix family) was found. Yandex OAuth tokens grant long-lived API access used to obtain IAM tokens and call Yandex services.
message: Yandex Cloud OAuth token found; revoke it in the Yandex OAuth application settings and issue a new token

name: Scaleway secret key (UUID)
description: A Scaleway API secret key assigned to a context keyword was found. Scaleway secret keys are UUIDs that sign API requests and grant access to the project's cloud resources.
message: Scaleway secret key found; delete the API key in the Scaleway console under Credentials and generate a new one

name: Scaleway access key (SCW prefix)
description: A Scaleway API access key using the SCW prefix was found. The access key identifies the API caller and is paired with a secret key to authenticate Scaleway API requests.
message: Scaleway access key found; delete the API key pair in the Scaleway console and create a replacement

name: Hetzner Cloud API token
description: A Hetzner Cloud API token assigned to a context keyword was found. Hetzner Cloud tokens grant full read/write access to the project's servers, volumes, networks and firewalls.
message: Hetzner Cloud API token found; revoke it in the Hetzner Cloud console under the project's Security > API tokens and create a new one

name: Linode personal access token
description: A Linode (Akamai) personal access token was found. Linode PATs are 64-character hex tokens that grant API access to the account's Linodes, volumes, DNS and billing per the token scopes.
message: Linode personal access token found; revoke it in the Linode Cloud Manager under My Profile > API Tokens and create a new token

name: Vultr API key
description: A Vultr API key assigned to a context keyword was found. Vultr API keys grant full access to the account's instances, block storage, DNS and billing.
message: Vultr API key found; revoke it in the Vultr customer portal under Account > API and generate a new key

name: Fastly API token
description: A Fastly API token assigned to a context keyword was found. Fastly tokens grant access to CDN service configuration, purging and account resources per the token scopes.
message: Fastly API token found; revoke it in the Fastly web interface under Account > API tokens and create a replacement

name: Akamai EdgeGrid client token
description: An Akamai EdgeGrid client token (akab- prefix) was found. The client token is part of the EdgeGrid credential set used to sign Akamai Open API requests.
message: Akamai EdgeGrid client token found; invalidate the API client credentials in Akamai Control Center (Identity & Access) and create a new client

name: Akamai EdgeGrid client secret
description: An Akamai EdgeGrid client secret assigned to a context keyword was found. The client secret signs EdgeGrid API requests and, with the matching tokens, grants Akamai API access.
message: Akamai EdgeGrid client secret found; invalidate the API client in Akamai Control Center and regenerate credentials

name: AWS SES SMTP password
description: An AWS SES SMTP password assigned to an SMTP context keyword was found. SES SMTP passwords are derived from IAM secret keys and allow sending email through Amazon SES.
message: AWS SES SMTP password found; delete the underlying IAM SMTP credential in the SES console and create new SMTP credentials

name: AWS MWS auth token
description: An Amazon Marketplace Web Service (MWS) auth token (amzn.mws. UUID) was found. MWS auth tokens authorize third-party applications to call Amazon seller APIs.
message: Amazon MWS auth token found; revoke the developer authorization in Seller Central and reauthorize the application

name: AWS AppSync GraphQL API key (da2-)
description: An AWS AppSync GraphQL API key (da2- prefix) was found. AppSync API keys authorize calls to the GraphQL API and can expose backend data sources.
message: AWS AppSync API key found; delete it in the AppSync console under Settings > API keys and create a new one

name: AWS Cognito identity/user pool ID
description: An AWS Cognito user pool ID assigned to a context keyword was found. While not secret on its own, a hardcoded Cognito pool ID combined with app client config can enable unauthorized sign-up or enumeration.
message: AWS Cognito user pool ID found; verify app client restrictions and disable self sign-up if not intended; treat any paired app client secret as exposed

name: AWS Cognito app client secret
description: An AWS Cognito user pool app client secret assigned to a context keyword was found. The client secret authenticates the app client and must remain confidential.
message: AWS Cognito app client secret found; in the Cognito console delete and recreate the app client to rotate the secret

name: AWS Amplify app deploy/webhook ID
description: An AWS Amplify app ID or webhook URL was found. Amplify webhook URLs can trigger builds and deployments without further authentication.
message: AWS Amplify webhook URL found; delete the incoming webhook in the Amplify console and recreate it

name: AWS SNS topic ARN with credentials context
description: An AWS SNS topic ARN assigned to a context keyword was found. While the ARN is an identifier, exposure alongside credentials can aid targeting of publish/subscribe abuse.
message: AWS SNS topic ARN found in source; ensure the topic policy restricts publish/subscribe and rotate any nearby AWS credentials

name: Azure AD client secret
description: An Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) application client secret assigned to a context keyword was found. The client secret authenticates a service principal and grants the app's API permissions.
message: Azure AD client secret found; delete the secret in Entra ID under App registrations > Certificates & secrets and create a new one

name: Azure SAS token (shared access signature)
description: An Azure Shared Access Signature (SAS) token query string was found. SAS tokens grant delegated, time-limited access to Azure Storage or other Azure resources.
message: Azure SAS token found; revoke it by rotating the storage account key or stored access policy that signed it

name: Azure Service Bus connection string
description: An Azure Service Bus (or Event Hubs / Relay) connection string with an embedded SharedAccessKey was found. It grants send/listen/manage access to the messaging namespace.
message: Azure Service Bus connection string found; regenerate the Shared Access Key in the Azure portal under Shared access policies

name: Azure Cosmos DB account key
description: An Azure Cosmos DB account key embedded in an AccountKey connection string was found. The key grants full read/write access to the Cosmos DB account.
message: Azure Cosmos DB key found; regenerate the primary/secondary key in the Azure portal under Keys

name: Azure Cognitive Search admin key
description: An Azure AI Search (Cognitive Search) admin API key assigned to a context keyword was found. Admin keys grant full management of the search service, indexes and documents.
message: Azure Search admin key found; regenerate the admin key in the Azure portal under Keys for the search service

name: Azure Container Registry password
description: An Azure Container Registry (ACR) admin password assigned to a context keyword was found. ACR admin credentials grant push/pull access to all repositories in the registry.
message: Azure Container Registry password found; regenerate the admin password in the ACR access keys, or disable admin user and use tokens

name: Azure DevOps personal access token
description: An Azure DevOps personal access token assigned to a context keyword was found. Azure DevOps PATs grant scoped access to repos, pipelines, work items and packages.
message: Azure DevOps PAT found; revoke it in Azure DevOps under User settings > Personal access tokens and create a new scoped token

name: GCP OAuth access token (ya29.)
description: A Google Cloud / Google OAuth 2.0 access token (ya29. prefix) was found. These bearer tokens grant API access for the authorized scopes until they expire.
message: Google OAuth access token found; it is short-lived but revoke the grant at myaccount.google.com or via the token revocation endpoint and rotate the issuing client

name: GCP OAuth refresh token (1//)
description: A Google OAuth 2.0 refresh token (1// prefix) was found. Refresh tokens are long-lived and can mint new access tokens for the authorized scopes indefinitely.
message: Google OAuth refresh token found; revoke it at myaccount.google.com under third-party access or via the OAuth client and reauthorize

name: Google reCAPTCHA secret key
description: A Google reCAPTCHA secret key assigned to a context keyword was found. The secret key verifies reCAPTCHA responses server-side; exposure lets attackers bypass or abuse the verification.
message: Google reCAPTCHA secret key found; recreate the reCAPTCHA site in the admin console to obtain a new secret key

name: Firebase Cloud Messaging server key (AAAA)
description: A Firebase Cloud Messaging (legacy) server key beginning with AAAA was found. The FCM server key authorizes sending push notifications to all of an app's devices.
message: Firebase Cloud Messaging server key found; delete the legacy server key in the Firebase console and migrate to the FCM HTTP v1 API with a service account

name: Firebase Realtime Database URL
description: A Firebase Realtime Database URL was found. An exposed database URL with permissive rules can allow unauthenticated read/write to the database.
message: Firebase Realtime Database URL found; verify the database security rules require authentication and do not allow public read/write

name: DigitalOcean Spaces access key
description: A DigitalOcean Spaces access key (DO00 prefix, S3-compatible) was found. Paired with its secret, it grants access to the account's Spaces object storage.
message: DigitalOcean Spaces access key found; delete the Spaces key pair in the DigitalOcean control panel under API > Spaces keys and create a new one

name: DigitalOcean Spaces secret key
description: A DigitalOcean Spaces secret key assigned to a context keyword was found. The secret signs S3-compatible requests to DigitalOcean Spaces object storage.
message: DigitalOcean Spaces secret key found; delete the Spaces key pair in the DigitalOcean control panel and regenerate

name: Render API key (rnd_)
description: A Render API key (rnd_ prefix) was found. Render API keys grant access to manage the account's services, deploys and environment variables.
message: Render API key found; revoke it in the Render dashboard under Account Settings > API Keys and create a new one

name: Railway API/project token
description: A Railway API or project token assigned to a context keyword was found. Railway tokens grant programmatic access to deploy and manage projects, services and variables.
message: Railway token found; revoke it in the Railway dashboard under Account > Tokens (or project settings) and create a new token

name: Fly.io API token (fo1_ / FlyV1)
description: A Fly.io API/deploy token (fo1_ prefix or FlyV1 macaroon) was found. Fly.io tokens grant access to deploy and manage the account's apps and machines.
message: Fly.io token found; revoke it with 'fly tokens revoke' or in the Fly.io dashboard and issue a new deploy token

name: Aiven API token (aivenv1 / context)
description: An Aiven API token assigned to a context keyword was found. Aiven tokens grant access to manage the account's managed database and streaming services.
message: Aiven API token found; revoke it in the Aiven console under User Information > Authentication tokens and create a new one

name: Cloudflare Origin CA key (v1.0-)
description: A Cloudflare Origin CA key (v1.0- prefix) was found. This key authorizes issuing and managing Cloudflare Origin CA certificates for the account.
message: Cloudflare Origin CA key found; revoke it in the Cloudflare dashboard under SSL/TLS > Origin Server and generate a new key

name: Cloudflare Stream signing key context
description: A Cloudflare Stream signing key (PEM/JWK key material) assigned to a context keyword was found. Stream signing keys mint signed tokens that authorize playback of protected videos.
message: Cloudflare Stream signing key found; revoke the signing key via the Cloudflare Stream API and create a new one

name: OVH application secret / consumer key
description: An OVH API application secret or consumer key assigned to a context keyword was found. These credentials authenticate against the OVH API and grant access to managed resources.
message: OVH API credential found; revoke the application/consumer key in the OVH API management console and create new credentials

name: UpCloud API credentials context
description: An UpCloud API password assigned to a context keyword was found. UpCloud uses username/password API credentials that grant access to manage the account's cloud servers and storage.
message: UpCloud API credential found; change the API user's password in the UpCloud control panel and rotate

name: Alibaba Cloud STS temporary access key (STS.)
description: An Alibaba Cloud STS temporary access key ID (STS. prefix) was found. STS tokens grant short-lived, assumed-role access to Alibaba Cloud resources.
message: Alibaba Cloud STS temporary key found; it is short-lived but revoke the issuing RAM role's trust or rotate the parent credentials

name: IBM Cloud Object Storage HMAC secret access key
description: An IBM Cloud Object Storage HMAC secret access key assigned to a context keyword was found. The HMAC secret signs S3-compatible requests to IBM COS buckets.
message: IBM COS HMAC secret access key found; delete the HMAC credential on the COS service instance and create a new one

name: Azure Storage connection string
description: An Azure Storage account connection string with embedded AccountKey was found. It grants full access to the storage account's blobs, files, queues and tables.
message: Azure Storage connection string found; regenerate the storage account key in the Azure portal under Access keys

name: GCP service account email + key context
description: A reference to a GCP service account private_key_id alongside a service account email was found. Exposure of the key id together with the private key compromises the service account.
message: GCP service account private_key_id found; delete the key in the GCP console under IAM > Service accounts > Keys and create a new key

name: Google Maps Platform API key (AIza, restricted-context)
description: A Google Maps Platform API key (AIza prefix) in a maps context was found. Unrestricted Maps keys can be abused to incur billing charges against the project.
message: Google Maps API key found; regenerate it in the GCP console under APIs & Services > Credentials and add HTTP-referrer/IP restrictions

name: Scaleway API token (UUID, context)
description: A Scaleway-style API key/token UUID under a generic Scaleway context keyword was found. It may grant access to Scaleway project resources.
message: Scaleway API token found; delete the key in the Scaleway console under Credentials and generate a new one

name: Tencent Cloud COS connection (SecretId+SecretKey)
description: A Tencent Cloud secret id (AKID prefix) appearing together with COS/configuration context was found. With the matching secret key it grants access to Tencent COS object storage.
message: Tencent Cloud SecretId found; disable the API key pair in the Tencent Cloud CAM console and create a new key

name: Cloudflare Global API key (legacy 37-hex)
description: A Cloudflare legacy Global API Key appearing alongside a Cloudflare email/key context was found. The Global API Key grants full account-wide access and cannot be scoped.
message: Cloudflare Global API Key found; roll it in the Cloudflare dashboard under My Profile > API Tokens > Global API Key and migrate to scoped tokens

name: GCP Firebase web API config apiKey (AIza, firebase context)
description: A Firebase web app configuration apiKey (AIza prefix) in a firebase config context was found. While intended to be public, exposure with weak security rules can enable abuse of Firebase services.
message: Firebase web apiKey found; ensure Firebase security rules and App Check are enforced; restrict the key in the GCP console if not meant to be public

name: Hetzner DNS API token (context)
description: A Hetzner DNS Console API token under a Hetzner DNS context keyword was found. It grants management of the account's DNS zones and records.
message: Hetzner DNS API token found; revoke it in the Hetzner DNS Console under API tokens and create a new one

name: Vultr Object Storage S3 secret (context)
description: A Vultr Object Storage S3-compatible secret key under a Vultr storage context keyword was found. The secret signs requests to Vultr object storage buckets.
message: Vultr Object Storage secret key found; regenerate the object storage credentials in the Vultr portal and rotate

name: Fastly Compute / service ID with token context
description: A Fastly service ID under a token context was found. Combined with an API token it identifies the CDN service targeted for configuration changes.
message: Fastly service ID found in source; ensure any associated API tokens are scoped and rotate tokens that accompany it

name: Render deploy hook URL
description: A Render deploy hook URL was found. Anyone with the URL can trigger a deployment of the associated Render service without authentication.
message: Render deploy hook URL found; regenerate the deploy hook in the Render service settings

name: Linode Object Storage access key (context)
description: A Linode Object Storage S3-compatible access key under a Linode storage context was found. With the matching secret it grants access to Linode object storage buckets.
message: Linode Object Storage access key found; revoke the object storage key pair in the Linode Cloud Manager and create new credentials

name: Azure Maps subscription key (context)
description: An Azure Maps subscription key under an Azure Maps context keyword was found. The key authorizes calls to Azure Maps services and can incur billing if abused.
message: Azure Maps subscription key found; regenerate the key in the Azure portal under the Maps account's Authentication

name: GCP Cloud Run / IAP service identity token (context)
description: A Google-issued identity/bearer token (eyJ JWT) bound to a GCP service context keyword was found. Identity tokens authorize invocation of protected Cloud Run / IAP endpoints.
message: Google identity token found; it is short-lived but rotate the issuing service account key and verify IAP/Cloud Run access bindings

name: Alibaba Cloud secret access key (context)
description: An Alibaba Cloud access key secret under an Alibaba/aliyun context keyword was found. Paired with the LTAI access key id, it grants full API access to the account's resources.
message: Alibaba Cloud access key secret found; disable the AccessKey pair in the Alibaba Cloud RAM console and create a new one

name: OVH application key (context)
description: An OVH API application key under an OVH context keyword was found. The application key identifies the API application and pairs with the application secret and consumer key.
message: OVH application key found; revoke the application credentials in the OVH API management console and recreate

name: Yandex Cloud API key (AQVN context)
description: A Yandex Cloud service account API key (AQVN prefix) was found. These long-lived keys authorize API calls for the associated service account.
message: Yandex Cloud API key found; delete it in the Yandex Cloud console under the service account's API keys and create a new one

name: IBM Cloud IAM bearer token (context)
description: An IBM Cloud IAM bearer access token (eyJ JWT) under an IBM/iam context was found. These short-lived tokens authorize IBM Cloud API calls for the account.
message: IBM Cloud IAM bearer token found; it is short-lived but rotate the underlying IAM API key in the IBM Cloud console

name: Aiven service connection URI (context)
description: An Aiven managed-service connection URI with embedded password under an Aiven context was found. It grants direct access to the managed database or streaming service.
message: Aiven service connection URI with embedded password found; reset the service user's password in the Aiven console and rotate

name: Scaleway IAM API secret key (context)
description: A Scaleway IAM API secret key under a Scaleway IAM context was found. It signs API requests for the associated IAM application/user and grants permitted resource access.
message: Scaleway IAM secret key found; delete the API key in the Scaleway IAM console and generate a new one

name: Tencent Cloud SCF / API gateway secret (context)
description: A Tencent Cloud secret key under a generic tencent/qcloud secret context was found. It signs Tencent Cloud API and serverless requests granting account resource access.
message: Tencent Cloud secret key found; disable the API key pair in the Tencent Cloud CAM console and rotate

name: Cloudflare R2 S3 secret access key (context)
description: A Cloudflare R2 S3-compatible secret access key under an R2 context keyword was found. The 64-hex secret signs requests to R2 object storage buckets.
message: Cloudflare R2 secret access key found; revoke the R2 API token in the Cloudflare dashboard under R2 > Manage API Tokens and create a new one

name: Azure subscription / tenant credential bundle (context)
description: An Azure service principal password (clientSecret) inside an az login / azure credentials JSON context was found. It authenticates the service principal for full Azure CLI/SDK access.
message: Azure service principal clientSecret found; delete the secret in Entra ID under App registrations > Certificates & secrets and rotate

name: GCP API key (AIza) generic
description: A Google API key (AIza prefix) was found. Google API keys authorize calls to enabled Google APIs and, if unrestricted, can be abused to incur billing or access data.
message: Google API key found; regenerate it in the GCP console under APIs & Services > Credentials and apply API/referrer restrictions

name: Hetzner Cloud robot webservice password (context)
description: A Hetzner Robot webservice password under a Hetzner robot context was found. Robot credentials manage dedicated servers, reverse DNS and boot configuration.
message: Hetzner Robot webservice password found; change it in the Hetzner Robot panel under Settings > Webservice and rotate

name: Vultr deploy / API token (context, hex)
description: A Vultr API token in hexadecimal form under a Vultr context was found. It grants management access to the account's cloud resources.
message: Vultr API token found; revoke it in the Vultr customer portal under Account > API and generate a new key

name: Akamai EdgeGrid access token (context)
description: An Akamai EdgeGrid access token (akab- prefix) under an Akamai context was found. It is part of the EdgeGrid credential set authorizing Akamai Open API calls.
message: Akamai EdgeGrid access token found; invalidate the API client in Akamai Control Center and recreate credentials

name: GCP service account private key (PEM in JSON)
description: A GCP service account RSA private key embedded in a service account JSON (private_key field) was found. It fully authenticates as the service account and grants all its IAM permissions.
message: GCP service account private key found; delete the key in the GCP console under IAM > Service accounts > Keys and create a new one

name: Railway project deploy token (context, base64)
description: A Railway project/deploy token in opaque form under a Railway context was found. It authorizes CI deploys and access to the project's services and variables.
message: Railway deploy token found; revoke it in the Railway project settings under Tokens and create a new one

name: Oracle Cloud (OCI) config fingerprint+key context
description: An OCI config fingerprint paired with key context was found. The fingerprint identifies the API signing key uploaded to the OCI user; its exposure alongside the private key compromises the user.
message: OCI API key fingerprint found; ensure the associated private key is not committed and rotate the OCI API key if so

name: DigitalOcean App Platform / function deploy URL (context)
description: A DigitalOcean deploy/trigger URL containing an embedded token under a DigitalOcean context was found. Such URLs can trigger deployments without further authentication.
message: DigitalOcean deploy/trigger URL with embedded token found; rotate the token in the DigitalOcean control panel

name: Fly.io org deploy token (FlyV1 macaroon)
description: A Fly.io FlyV1 macaroon deploy token was found. FlyV1 macaroons are scoped deploy tokens that authorize CI/CD to deploy and manage Fly.io apps.
message: Fly.io FlyV1 deploy token found; revoke it with 'fly tokens revoke' and issue a new scoped token

name: Tencent Cloud webhook URL (context)
description: A Tencent Cloud / WeCom group robot webhook URL with an embedded key was found. Anyone with the URL can post messages to the chat group.
message: WeCom/Tencent group robot webhook URL found; recreate the group robot to obtain a new webhook key

name: Cloudflare Workers / Pages deploy webhook URL
description: A Cloudflare Pages deploy hook URL with an embedded token was found. Anyone with the URL can trigger a new deployment of the Cloudflare Pages project.
message: Cloudflare Pages deploy hook URL found; delete and recreate the deploy hook in the Cloudflare Pages project settings

name: Bitbucket app password
description: A Bitbucket app password used for HTTP Basic auth against the Bitbucket Cloud API and git operations was found. App passwords grant scoped access to repositories, pull requests and pipelines.
message: Bitbucket app password found; revoke it under Bitbucket Personal settings > App passwords and rotate

name: Bitbucket app password (ATBB prefix)
description: A Bitbucket Cloud app password using the ATBB prefix was found. These credentials authenticate to the Bitbucket API and git over HTTPS.
message: Bitbucket app password (ATBB) found; revoke it under Bitbucket Personal settings > App passwords

name: Bitbucket OAuth client secret
description: A Bitbucket OAuth consumer client secret was found. It is used together with the client key to obtain access tokens for the Bitbucket API.
message: Bitbucket OAuth client secret found; rotate the consumer credentials in workspace settings

name: Azure DevOps personal access token
description: An Azure DevOps (azure.com / visualstudio.com) personal access token was found. These 52-character base32 tokens grant scoped access to repos, pipelines, work items and artifacts.
message: Azure DevOps PAT found; revoke it under User settings > Personal access tokens and rotate

name: CircleCI personal API token
description: A CircleCI personal API token was found. It grants access to the CircleCI API for pipelines, projects and environment variables for the owning user.

name: Vimeo OAuth client secret
description: A Vimeo API app client secret was found. Combined with the client id it completes the OAuth flow to mint access tokens acting on Vimeo accounts.
message: Vimeo client secret found; rotate it in the Vimeo developer app settings

name: JW Player API v1 secret
description: A JW Player Management API v1 secret key (24-character base62) was found. It signs JW Player v1 management API requests for the property.
message: JW Player v1 secret found; rotate it in the JW Player dashboard under API Credentials

name: Brightcove policy key (BCpkc)
description: A Brightcove Playback API policy key (BCpkc prefix) was found. It authorizes Playback API access to video metadata and sources for the account.
message: Brightcove policy key found; create a new policy key in Brightcove if this key allows search and rotate

name: Wistia OAuth access token
description: A Wistia OAuth bearer access token (wsa_ prefixed) was found. It authorizes Wistia API actions on behalf of the authorized user.
message: Wistia OAuth access token found; revoke the authorization in Wistia and rotate the app credentials

name: Deepgram-style media key skip placeholder
description: A Bunny Stream library API access key (UUID format) was found. It authorizes Bunny Stream video library uploads, edits and deletes for the account.
message: Bunny Stream library key found; regenerate it in the Bunny.net dashboard for the stream library

name: Dolby.io media app key
description: A Dolby.io app key (UUID-like identifier) was found. Combined with the app secret it authorizes the Dolby.io Media Processing APIs.
message: Dolby.io app key found; rotate it in the Dolby.io dashboard application credentials

name: SoundCloud OAuth access token
description: A SoundCloud OAuth access token (oauth-prefixed numeric/hex) was found. It authorizes SoundCloud API actions on behalf of the authorized user.
message: SoundCloud OAuth access token found; revoke the app authorization and rotate the client secret

name: Discogs consumer secret
description: A Discogs OAuth consumer secret was found. Combined with the consumer key it authorizes the Discogs OAuth flow to act on user accounts.
message: Discogs consumer secret found; rotate the application credentials in Discogs Developer settings

name: Giphy production app key context
description: A Giphy production application key in a production-key context was found. Production keys have higher quotas and broader access than beta keys.
message: Giphy production app key found; regenerate it in the Giphy developers dashboard

name: Pixabay numeric key context
description: A Pixabay API key in a generic pixabay key context was found. It authorizes Pixabay media search under the account rate limit.
message: Pixabay API key found; regenerate it in your Pixabay account API page

name: Flickr API key
description: A Flickr API key (32-character hex) was found. It authorizes Flickr API photo search and read access under the app rate limits.
message: Flickr API key found; regenerate the app key and secret in the Flickr App Garden

name: Imgur access token (bearer)
description: An Imgur OAuth2 access token (40-character hex bearer) was found. It authorizes Imgur API actions on behalf of the authorized user account.
message: Imgur access token found; revoke the app authorization and rotate the application credentials

name: KeyCDN account-context API key
description: A KeyCDN API key in a keycdn context was found. It authorizes management of CDN zones and purges on the KeyCDN account.
message: KeyCDN API secret found; regenerate it in the KeyCDN dashboard account API settings

name: StackPath client ID
description: A StackPath API client ID (UUID format) was found. It identifies the API application and pairs with the client secret for OAuth token minting.
message: StackPath client ID found; ensure the paired client secret is not committed and review API exposure

name: CDN77 login token context
description: A CDN77 login token in a cdn77 login context was found. It authorizes CDN77 API management of resources and purges.
message: CDN77 login token found; regenerate it in the CDN77 dashboard API settings

name: G-Core Labs permanent API token (gcore_)
description: A G-Core Labs permanent API token (gcore_ prefixed) was found. It grants API access to G-Core CDN, storage and cloud resources.
message: G-Core Labs API token found; revoke it in the G-Core control panel API token settings

name: Statsig server secret key (secret-)
description: A Statsig server-side secret key (secret- prefixed) was found. It grants server SDK access to evaluate and manage feature gates, experiments and dynamic configs.
message: Statsig server secret key found; revoke it in the Statsig console under Project Settings > API Keys

name: Split.io server-side API key
description: A Split.io (Harness FME) server-side SDK API key was found. It grants server SDK access to feature-flag treatments and impression data for the environment.
message: Split.io server-side API key found; rotate it in the Split admin settings under API keys

name: Optimizely SDK datafile token
description: An Optimizely SDK key / datafile access token was found. It authorizes fetching the Optimizely feature-flag datafile and experiment configuration for the environment.
message: Optimizely SDK/datafile token found; rotate it in the Optimizely settings under environments

name: TMDB v4 access token context
description: A TMDB v4 access token referenced in an access-token context was found. It is a bearer JWT authorizing v4 API requests under the account.
message: TMDB v4 access token found; regenerate the API credentials in your TMDB account settings

name: Unsplash application id context
description: An Unsplash application id paired with a Client-ID value was found. It identifies the Unsplash app for API authorization.
message: Unsplash application id found; ensure the paired secret key is not committed and review exposure

name: Vimeo personal access token context
description: A Vimeo personal access token referenced in a personal-token context was found. It authorizes Vimeo API actions on the account until revoked.
message: Vimeo personal access token found; revoke it in the Vimeo developer app settings

name: JW Player API key (v2 key)
description: A JW Player Management API v2 key (8-character base62 site id style) paired with an api-key context was found. It identifies the JW Player API credential.
message: JW Player API key found; ensure the paired secret is not committed and rotate credentials

name: TMDB session id
description: A TMDB authenticated session id (40-character hex) was found. It authorizes account-scoped TMDB actions such as rating and watchlist edits.
message: TMDB session id found; delete the session in your TMDB account and generate a new one

name: Last.fm API key
description: A Last.fm API key (32-character hex) was found. It authorizes Last.fm API read calls under the application rate limit.
message: Last.fm API key found; regenerate it in your Last.fm API account settings

name: Spotify OAuth access token (bearer)
description: A Spotify Web API OAuth access token (BQ prefixed bearer) was found. It authorizes Spotify API scopes on the account until it expires.
message: Spotify access token found; it is short-lived, rotate the refresh token and client secret to be safe

name: GameAnalytics game key
description: A GameAnalytics game key (32-character hex) was found. Paired with the secret key it identifies the game for analytics event submission.
message: GameAnalytics game key found; ensure the paired secret key is not committed and rotate if exposed

name: Tenor v2 client key context
description: A Tenor v2 client key paired with a tenor key context was found. It authorizes Tenor GIF API search under the Google project quota.
message: Tenor client key found; it is a Google API key, restrict and rotate it in the Google Cloud console

name: Steam server API key context
description: A Steam Web API key paired with a steam server-key context was found. It authorizes Steam Web API methods under the registered key.
message: Steam server API key found; revoke it at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey and register a new one

name: Wistia data API token context
description: A Wistia data API token paired with a wistia data context was found. It authorizes read/write access to Wistia media and stats.
message: Wistia data API token found; revoke it in Account Settings > API Access and create a new token

name: PlayFab title shared secret context
description: A PlayFab title shared secret in a playfab title-secret context was found. It authorizes server API calls bypassing client auth for the title.
message: PlayFab title shared secret found; rotate it in PlayFab Game Manager Secret Keys immediately

name: api.video sandbox key context
description: An api.video sandbox API key paired with an apivideo sandbox context was found. It authorizes sandbox uploads and management on the api.video account.
message: api.video sandbox key found; regenerate it in the api.video dashboard under API Keys

name: ConfigCat SDK key (assignment context)
description: A ConfigCat SDK key in a configcat sdk-key context was found. It authorizes the ConfigCat client to fetch feature-flag configuration for the environment.
message: ConfigCat SDK key found; rotate it in the ConfigCat dashboard under SDK Keys if it is a server-side key
